cells.rationale: Security-critical fail-closed grant guard with fencing tokens, anti-TOCTOU reads, whole-tuple validation and bypass-vector defense — a hard opus gate, at xhigh for the new contract-shaped confinement primitive and its stop-and-surface design judgment.

Override ordering into existing guards carries a subtle security bypass invariant (loose match or misordered deny becomes a hole plus protected-path carve-outs), a hard opus gate at xhigh for the load-bearing correctness invariant.
